title: Dragon Trail
description: A simple plugin that adds a cool trail to the ender dragon.
body:
# Dragon Trail

![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/dfk4v4Y2?style=for-the-badge&label=Latest%20Version)

## Description

DragonTrailPlugin is a **plugin** that enhances the Minecraft experience by adding an **epic dragon-themed particle trail** behind every dragon in the world. The plugin continuously generates a **dense and extensive particle trail** as the dragon moves, mimicking the breath and energy of a dragon in flight. This creates a dynamic, magical effect that can be seen as the dragon flies through the world.

Additionally, this plugin provides a **command to toggle** the particle trail on or off, allowing server admins or players to manage the effect and optimize server performance. When enabled, the trail creates a constantly flowing pattern of particles following the dragon, ensuring that the action always feels immersive and visually exciting.

## Key Features
- **Dragon Particle Trail**: Adds a continuous, detailed dragon breath particle trail following each dragon in the world.
- **Toggler Command**: Use the `/toggledragontrail` command to turn the particle effect on or off, giving full control over whether the trail is active.
- **Automatic Activation**: The trail automatically activates for any dragon in the world, creating a seamless visual experience.
- **Performance Optimization**: Toggle the trail to reduce lag during high-traffic times on your server.
- **Works on All Dragons**: The plugin works with all dragon entities in Minecraft, creating a consistent effect across your world.

## Commands
- `/toggledragontrail`: Toggle the dragon particle trail effect on or off.  
  - **Usage**: `/toggledragontrail`
  - **Permissions**: Default: all players

## Installation
1. Download the `DragonTrail.jar` file.
2. Place the `.jar` file in your server's `/plugins` directory.
3. Restart or reload the server.
4. The plugin will now automatically generate a particle trail for all dragons in the world.

## Requirements
- Minecraft Server running **Bukkit/Paper/Purpur/Spigot 1.21+** or higher.
- **No additional dependencies** required.


## Connect With Us
- [Discord](https://discord.gg/uYjttvug) - Join our community for support and discussions.
- [Website](https://creations-inventostarz.pages.dev) - Visit our official site for more information and resources.
